domain_context: Gamified P2P Trading Platform (Esports meets Wall Street)

headings.usage: H1, H2, Primary CTAs. Wide, futuristic, high-stakes esports feel. Anti-default: avoid Inter/Roboto.

body.usage: General body text, mission statements, FAQ answers.

data_and_ticker.usage: Live broadcast ticker, pricing numbers, tables, metrics, stat pills. Tabular numerals for trading data.

layout_and_spacing.pro_card_highlight: relative rounded-xl bg-[#0F1628] border-2 border-[#D4AF37] shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(212,175,55,0.15)]

navigation.style: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-[#0A0E1A]/80 backdrop-blur-2xl border-b border-white/5
navigation.links: font-outfit text-sm uppercase tracking-widest text-[#94A3B8] hover:text-[#D4AF37] transition-colors

hero.composition: Cinematic, text-heavy left alignment with bold H1 ('AIN'T YOU TIRED OF TRADING AGAINST THE BROKER?'), dual CTAs, and a right-side glowing data/chart visualization.
hero.stat_pills: inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 rounded-none border border-white/10 bg-[#0F1628]/50 font-mono text-sm tracking-wide text-[#00C9A7]

buttons.primary: bg-[#D4AF37] text-[#0A0E1A] font-unbounded font-bold uppercase px-8 py-4 rounded-none hover:bg-white hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(212,175,55,0.4)] transition-all duration-300
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-white font-unbounded font-bold uppercase px-8 py-4 rounded-none border border-white/20 hover:border-[#D4AF37] hover:text-[#D4AF37] transition-all duration-300

tables.header: bg-[#151E32] text-[#D4AF37] text-sm uppercase py-4 px-6 border-b border-white/10

live_ticker.style: bg-[#0A0E1A] border-y border-[#D4AF37]/30 py-3 overflow-hidden flex items-center shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(212,175,55,0.1)]

accordion.item: bg-[#0F1628] border border-white/5 rounded-none px-6 py-2
accordion.trigger: font-outfit text-lg font-medium text-white hover:text-[#D4AF37] py-4 flex justify-between w-full text-left

motion.hover_states: subtle lift (-translate-y-1) and glow (shadow-lg shadow-[#D4AF37]/10) for cards.
motion.ticker_animation: continuous linear scroll (Marquee) simulating live data.

hero_background.usage: Use as a subtle low-opacity (10-20%) background overlay in the hero section.

circuit_texture.description: Abstract motherboard circuits with diagonal grid overlay.
circuit_texture.usage: Background texture for the Product Suite or Pricing section to inject the 'esports' tech vibe.

gold_accent.usage: Use inside the Pro Pricing card as a subtle background image overlay with multiply/screen blend mode.

duel_players.description: Person sitting on gaming chair playing.
duel_players.usage: Image for 1v1 DUEL product deep-dive card (half-width image, half-width text).

tournament_players.usage: Image for TRADING ROYALE or MULTI TRADER product card (alternating layout).

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute formatted as kebab-case and role-based (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Load custom fonts from Google Fonts: 'Unbounded' (Headings), 'Outfit' (Body), 'JetBrains Mono' (Data).
Implement pure HTML/Tailwind for the high-end marketing layouts. Avoid default Vercel-look generic cards. Use glassmorphism blocks with #D4AF37 borders where requested.
Alternate the layout (left/right) for the five product deep-dive sections (1v1 DUEL, TRADING ROYALE, MULTI TRADER, TAG TEAM TRADING, COMMUNITY BATTLES).
For the live ticker, simulate a scrolling marquee with mock trade data (e.g., 'USER77 WON $500 IN 1V1 DUEL', 'ROYALE ROUND STARTING 05:00'). Colorize wins/losses.
Ensure the 'MOST POPULAR' Pro Plan pricing card uses the gold border glow.
Use lucide-react for all iconography. No emojis allowed in the UI.
Buttons and major cards should lean toward sharp (rounded-none or small radius) to fit the competitive, aggressive esports aesthetic.
Render mini-charts using Recharts if it enhances the hero section or 'How It Works' area.
